props.name: imgageSrc
props.description: The image you want to render inside the container.

props.name: grid
props.description: The number of cells present in the distortion grid

props.name: mouse
props.description: The size of the distortion effect that follows the cursor.

props.name: relaxation
props.description: The speed at which grid cells return to their initial state.

props.name: strength
props.description: The overall strength of the distortion effect.

props.name: className
props.description: Any custom class(es) you want to apply to the container.
